stemHtml: When manoeuvring an aircraft with the autopilot in CWS Mode, autopilot control is (1) _____. The aircraft is being controlled by (2) _____ through the (3) _____. Inputs in this mode must (4) _____.

options.a: (1) Temporarily Bypassed (2) The Pilot (3) MCP (4) Overcome those of the AP
options.b: (1) Engaged (2) HDG/Alt Bugs (3) MCP (4) Overcome those of the AP
options.c: (1) Temporarily Bypassed (2) The Pilot (3) Control Column (4) Be proportional to those used in manual flight
options.d: (1) Disengaged (2) The Pilot (3) Control Column (4) Be proportional to those used in manual flight.
